name: Seaweed
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Seaweed light and dark design-system boards: kelp-olive ribbons, sea-teal navigation, foam-white surfaces, tidal shadows, and fluid data flows. The light and dark boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for fluid analytical UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual data labels and chart-heavy screens.
layout: Precise 8px data grids, flowing frond dividers, tidal pool panels, soft foam surfaces, and layered analytical density.
